items.title: The Suns' first Summer League game is tomorrow! For @sports360az.bsky.social, I wrote about a few specific things I'm watching out for with Khaman Maluach, Rasheer Fleming, Koa Peat, Koby Brea and more:

media.title: Setting expectations for key Suns players in 2026 NBA Summer League
media.description: By Gerald Bourguet The Phoenix Suns will get their first taste of 2026 NBA Summer League action on Friday. With so many key youngsters on the roster, there's no better time to go through some of the m...

items.title: The Suns have created a smart development path for Khaman Maluach
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: The Suns have created a smart development path for Khaman Maluach Yahoo Sports

items.title: Just under $13M AAV for Mark Williams is fair value. Good business for him and the Suns - not a super long or expensive deal to stunt Khaman Maluach’s growth, but also locks in their best option to start at C next season. 15 players under contract now including Bouyea/Highsmith
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt: Just under $13M AAV for Mark Williams is fair value. Good business for him and the Suns - not a super long or expensive deal to stunt Khaman Maluach’s growth, but also locks in their best option to start at C next season. 15 players under contract now including Bouyea/Highsmith
